# Cats Can Dance

> Cats Can Dance is a Bangalore, India event organiser producing the best underground dance music parties and electronic events in Bangalore and across India. We host cult RSVP-only "Episodes", drop limited streetwear, curate playlists, and grow a global community of music lovers who happen to love their pets just as much as their record collections.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://catscandance.com/): Brand overview, upcoming Episodes, community.
- [About](https://catscandance.com/about): Who we are, why we exist, FAQ.
- [Events](https://catscandance.com/events): Every Cats Can Dance Episode — past and upcoming, with RSVP.
- [Shop](https://catscandance.com/shop): Limited streetwear drops.
- [Blog](https://catscandance.com/blog): Long-form guides on Bangalore's party scene.

## Brand machine-readable

- [brand.json](https://catscandance.com/brand.json): Single-file canonical brand summary for AI agents.
- [llms-full.txt](https://catscandance.com/llms-full.txt): Long-form brand + every event with date, venue, lineup.
- [sitemap.xml](https://catscandance.com/sitemap.xml): Full site index.

## Partnerships

- [For Artists](https://catscandance.com/for-artists): How to play a Cats Can Dance Episode.
- [For Venues](https://catscandance.com/for-venues): Hosting a Cats Can Dance night.
- [For Investors](https://catscandance.com/for-investors): The brand and the business.

## Optional

- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/catscandance): Daily updates, Episode drops.
- [Email](mailto:hello@catscandance.com): Direct contact.

## Brand entity facts

- **Name:** Cats Can Dance (alt: CCD)
- **HQ:** Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Best known for:** Best underground parties in Bangalore, top event organiser in India, curated electronic music events, RSVP-only Episode format.
